headline: Jim Cramer Discusses CoStar Group’s Stock Decline and the Threat of AI
summary: CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:CSGP) is among the stocks in focus as Jim Cramer reviewed the S&P 500’s top performers and the Nasdaq 100’s biggest laggards for the first quarter. Third-worst was one I really wasn’t that familiar. It’s called CoStar Group, down 40%. Now, you can think of it as kind of a Zillow of […]
